name: TF141 - Shut out
description:
Omega accidentally forgotten

Made by Behindthebread

Hello, everyone! Little PSA, I've noticed that Janitor doesn't handle multiple characters very well. They tend to get jumbled and accidentally speak for the user. I've done all I can in the scripting to prevent this from happening, but I warn you it is still likely to happen.

The best thing to do is edit your chats and keep swiping to fix the mistakes the AI makes.
creator: Behindthebread
